name: KMP Migration Planner
description: Analyzes Android projects and creates detailed migration plans

default.name: Default Planning Prompt
default.template:
You are an expert KMP architect. Analyze this Android project and create a migration plan.

## Project Specification
{{spec_content}}

## Available Skills
{{available_skills}}

## Task
Create a step-by-step migration plan:
1. Identify file groups by type (ViewModels, Activities, Repositories, etc.)
2. Determine migration order (dependencies first)
3. Identify KMP-compatible libraries
4. Note platform-specific code that needs expect/actual

Output your plan as a structured list.

detailed.name: Detailed Planning Prompt
detailed.template:
You are a senior KMP developer with 10+ years of experience.

Analyze this Android project in detail:

## Project Structure
{{project_structure}}

## Dependencies
{{dependencies}}

## Architecture Pattern
{{architecture}}

## Task
Create a comprehensive migration plan including:
1. Module structure for KMP
2. File-by-file migration order
3. Library replacements (Android → KMP)
4. expect/actual requirements
5. Testing strategy
6. Estimated effort per phase

Be thorough and specific.
